name: chr1_1p11_2_SRGAP2_paralog
description: Pericentric 1p11.2-q21.1 SRGAP2 paralog family. SRGAP2A (ancestral, 1q32.1) gave rise via SD to SRGAP2B (1q21.1), SRGAP2C (1q21.1) and SRGAP2D (1p12), with SRGAP2C uniquely human and implicated in neoteny of cortical synapses.

architecture.internal_structure: Four paralogs of SRGAP2 (A/B/C/D) at 99%+ identity over the duplicated portion (truncated F-BAR exons); copies dispersed across 1p11.2-1q32.1.
